allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); try { new Function\(fs.readFileSync\('js/game.js', 'utf8'\)\); console.log\('game.js OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('game.js ERROR:', e.message\); } try { new Function\(fs.readFileSync\('js/sprites.js', 'utf8'\)\); console.log\('sprites.js OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('sprites.js ERROR:', e.message\); }")
